## Problem

What user or maintainer problem does this solve?

## Proposed solution

Describe the change.

## Scope

Is this generic framework behavior, example-only content, documentation, or deployment guidance?

## Safety notes

Does this affect uploads, private data, admin access, rate limits, AI prompts, or source trust?
